answer_text:
1. Read after TSL: Read the status of lock. If the lock is available, try to acquire the lock. Only release lock and get lock cause bus traffic.
2. TSL back off: Periodically acquire the lock. If the access failed, wait for a time and try again. The time of waiting increases when the access failed.
